Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before transitioning to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time required to complete Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time from the start of Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the occurrence of Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call in cases where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call in high-impact incidents
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it appears multiple times in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants ending with Completed + Resolved and Completed + Closed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed directly by Accepted + In Progress without intermediate waits
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time from case start to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time between consecutive occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in looping variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases involving product PROD582
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call when the activity sequence includes Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants where Completed + In Call occurs before final resolution
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that do not contain any wait states (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User, Accepted + Wait - Vendor)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User does not occur

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in high-frequency variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it precedes a transition to Completed + In Call without intermediate resolution steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
